title: haplolobus furfuraceus var. furfuraceus
intro: Haplolobus furfuraceus var. furfuraceus, also known as the Furry-flowered Haplolobus, is a plant species in the family Burseraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Haplolobus furfuraceus var. furfuraceus include treating various skin conditions and wounds, as well as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used in topical applications, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine.
